title: Cloning and base-editing of GFP transgenic rhesus monkey and off-target analysis
author: shaoxing Dai
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data analysis code for the study of OA-SCNT, a method to systematically evaluate the efficiency and safety of base editors in primates. The title of this study is "Cloning and base-editing of GFP transgenic rhesus monkey and off-target analysis". 
'DNA_offtarget.zip', 'indel_SV.zip', and 'RNA_offtarget.zip' are codes for analysis of DNA offtarget,indel and SV, and RNA offtarget.
steps_raw:
Data analysis code for the study of OA-SCNT, a method to systematically evaluate the efficiency and safety of base editors in primates. The title of this study is "Cloning and base-editing of GFP transgenic rhesus monkey and off-target analysis".
